objective: Plan the frozen unrelated-organization demand cohort, payment-or-risk ledger, independent supply, attack and security budget, regulatory alternatives, and zero-appreciation counterfactual.
falsifiable_claim: Sustained unrelated demand and viable security economics remain after explicit costs, risks, margins, subsidies, and zero asset appreciation are applied.
exit_criteria: At least three unrelated organizations across two selected service families meet the predeclared sustained period.
Fees and bonds cover frozen margin, independent supply exists, and results survive zero appreciation and subsidy disclosure.
Retained evidence log contains exactly one literal M14_DEMAND_SECURITY_ECONOMICS_EXIT=0; process exit status alone is insufficient.
adversarial_or_fault_proof: Replace unrelated organizations with affiliates or internal traffic; shorten period; collapse service families; omit cost, risk, margin, subsidy, supplier, attack budget, regulation, alternative, or appreciation assumptions.
remaining_nonclaims: Internal traffic, L0 adoption, System or receipt count, and token speculation never qualify as demand.
No native-asset necessity, compulsory settlement, or stage closure claim.
source_provenance: Plan-level proposal derived from docs/architecture/_meta/work-items/m0-m14-plan-gap-audit.md at origin/master 61eba1802992c01efa7d3188184ff315ad9d2ba0; status transaction 2026-07-22.
